description_long: This is a robust hammer with a large, rectangular head and a long, textured handle. The head is blocky and solid, likely made of metal, and features flat striking surfaces on both ends, suggesting it is a sledgehammer type. The handle is cylindrical with a series of raised bands or grips along its length, providing enhanced grip and control during use. The color scheme is predominantly gray, with subtle variations in tone between the head and handle. The hammer appears clean and well-maintained, with no visible signs of wear or branding. Its design is utilitarian, suitable for heavy-duty tasks in urban construction or demolition settings.
description: A heavy-duty sledgehammer with a large rectangular metal head and a long, textured gray handle. The design is clean, robust, and utilitarian.
description_view_0: Front view showing the broad, flat face of the hammer head and the full length of the textured handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rectangular profile of the hammer head and the cylindrical handle with visible grip bands.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the opposite flat face of the hammer head and the handle's grip details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the rectangular head profile and the handle's length and texture.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical handle with raised grip bands, likely made of plastic or composite material for enhanced grip.
attribute_head_type: Large rectangular sledgehammer head with flat striking faces on both ends, made of solid metal.
